# MORPH57: AI-Powered Career Adaptation

**MORPH57** is a smart resume builder designed to beat the ATS and catch the recruiter’s eye. By analyzing specific job descriptions, it automatically re-aligns your skills and highlights to ensure a 99% match for every application.

Beyond simple formatting, MORPH57 focuses on:

* **ATS Keyword Intelligence:** We don't just guess; we "de-code" the job description to inject the exact technical and soft-skill keywords algorithms are looking for, ensuring your resume lands at the top of the pile.
* **Contextual Re-Engineering:** Our AI doesn't just swap words—it reframes your past achievements to speak the specific language of the company you're targeting.
* **Dynamic Impact Scoring:** Receive real-time feedback on how well your "morphed" resume stacks up against the competition before you even hit send.
